series_metadata.series_description: Administrative records relating to the organization and functions of Disability:IN Ohio. Records may include: Pamphlets, literature, fact sheets, financial funding records, bi-laws and any other miscellaneous record produced in relation to Disability:IN Ohio.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Maintain for three (3) state fiscal years following the year in which the record was created. Destroy when no longer of administrative value or converted to Machine Readable format. A Certificate of Disposal is only required for records that have not been converted to Machine Readable format. ; Electronic: Maintain for three (3) state fiscal years following the year in which the record was created. Destroy when no longer of administrative value. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records., Paper: Trash ; Electronic: Erase
